testcase.name: verifyCaptionPropertyIsVisibleForCaptionTestControl

failure.message: [FAIL] Caption property is not visible to the user expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: verifyWidthButtonSizeIs50

failure.message: [FAIL] Width button size is not in the range 45 to 60. Actual width: 69.7708740234375 expected [true] but found [false]
